'''鈭歠-zh-dh''' ('''fazhadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wealthen|wealthen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wealthen|wealthen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-zh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| fazhadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazhadhithi|fazhadhithi]] || [[word:fazhadhiji|fazhadhiji]] || [[word:fazhadhishi|fazhadhishi]] || [[word:fazhadhi|fazhadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhadhuthuth|fazhadhuthuth]] || [[word:fazhadhujuj|fazhadhujuj]] || [[word:fazhadhushush|fazhadhushush]] || [[word:fazhadh|fazhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhadhuthu|fazhadhuthu]] || [[word:fazhadhuju|fazhadhuju]] || [[word:fazhadhushu|fazhadhushu]] || [[word:fazhadhu|fazhadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhadhufuth|fazhadhufuth]] || [[word:fazhadhufuj|fazhadhufuj]] || [[word:fazhadhufush|fazhadhufush]] || [[word:fazhadhuf|fazhadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazhadhethe|fazhadhethe]] || [[word:fazhadheje|fazhadheje]] || [[word:fazhadheshe|fazhadheshe]] || [[word:fazhadhe|fazhadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhadhothoth|fazhadhothoth]] || [[word:fazhadhojoj|fazhadhojoj]] || [[word:fazhadhoshosh|fazhadhoshosh]] || [[word:fazhadh|fazhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhadhotho|fazhadhotho]] || [[word:fazhadhojo|fazhadhojo]] || [[word:fazhadhosho|fazhadhosho]] || [[word:fazhadho|fazhadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhadhofoth|fazhadhofoth]] || [[word:fazhadhofoj|fazhadhofoj]] || [[word:fazhadhofosh|fazhadhofosh]] || [[word:fazhadhof|fazhadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazhadh忙th忙|fazhadh忙th忙]] || [[word:fazhadh忙j忙|fazhadh忙j忙]] || [[word:fazhadh忙sh忙|fazhadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:fazhadh忙|fazhadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhadhathath|fazhadhathath]] || [[word:fazhadhajaj|fazhadhajaj]] || [[word:fazhadhashash|fazhadhashash]] || [[word:fazhadh|fazhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhadhatha|fazhadhatha]] || [[word:fazhadhaja|fazhadhaja]] || [[word:fazhadhasha|fazhadhasha]] || [[word:fazhadha|fazhadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhadhafath|fazhadhafath]] || [[word:fazhadhafaj|fazhadhafaj]] || [[word:fazhadhafash|fazhadhafash]] || [[word:fazhadhaf|fazhadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fazhadhasha|fazhadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofazhadhasha|gofazhadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifazhadhasha|gokifazhadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fazhadhn眉sha|fazhadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkn眉sha|gofazhadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifazhadhn眉sha|gokifazhadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fazhadhsh毛sha|fazhadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofazhadhnksh毛sha|gofazhadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifazhadhsh毛sha|gokifazhadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazhadhrosha|fazhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkrosha|gofazhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazhadhrosha|gokifazhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fazhadhmusha|fazhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkmusha|gofazhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazhadhmusha|gokifazhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fazhadhsherasha|fazhadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofazhadhnksherasha|gofazhadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifazhadhsherasha|gokifazhadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fazhadhngasha|fazhadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkngasha|gofazhadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifazhadhngasha|gokifazhadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fazhadhyasha|fazhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkyasha|gofazhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifazhadhyasha|gokifazhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fazhadhyamasha|fazhadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkyamasha|gofazhadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifazhadhyamasha|gokifazhadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fazhadhn眉sh毛sha|fazhadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gofazhadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifazhadhn眉sh毛sha|gokifazhadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazhadhn眉rosha|fazhadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkn眉rosha|gofazhadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazhadhn眉rosha|gokifazhadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazhadhn眉musha|fazhadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkn眉musha|gofazhadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazhadhn眉musha|gokifazhadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fazhadhsh毛n眉sha|fazhadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofazhadhnksh毛n眉sha|gofazhadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifazhadhsh毛n眉sha|gokifazhadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazhadhsh毛rosha|fazhadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazhadhnksh毛rosha|gofazhadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazhadhsh毛rosha|gokifazhadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazhadhsh毛musha|fazhadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazhadhnksh毛musha|gofazhadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazhadhsh毛musha|gokifazhadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fazhadhron眉sha|fazhadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkron眉sha|gofazhadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifazhadhron眉sha|gokifazhadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fazhadhrosh毛sha|fazhadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkrosh毛sha|gofazhadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifazhadhrosh毛sha|gokifazhadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazhadhromusha|fazhadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkromusha|gofazhadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazhadhromusha|gokifazhadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fazhadhmun眉sha|fazhadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkmun眉sha|gofazhadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifazhadhmun眉sha|gokifazhadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fazhadhmush毛sha|fazhadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkmush毛sha|gofazhadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifazhadhmush毛sha|gokifazhadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazhadhmurosha|fazhadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazhadhnkmurosha|gofazhadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazhadhmurosha|gokifazhadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fazhadh|fazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙zh忙dh|f忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofazhadh|hofazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙zh忙dh|hof忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofazhadh|hohofazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙zh忙dh|hohof忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fazhadh|n眉fazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙zh忙dh|n眉f忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fazhadh|n眉n眉fazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙zh忙dh|n眉n眉f忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fazhadh|n茂fazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙zh忙dh|n茂f忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fazhadh|n茂n茂fazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙zh忙dh|n茂n茂f忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufazhadh|lufazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙zh忙dh|luf忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufazhadh|lulufazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙zh忙dh|luluf忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifazhadh|lifazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙zh忙dh|lif忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifazhadh|lilifazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙zh忙dh|lilif忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofazhadh|kofazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙zh忙dh|kof忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofazhadh|kokofazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙zh忙dh|kokof忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefazhadh|kefazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙zh忙dh|kef忙zh忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefazhadh|kekefazhadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙zh忙dh|kekef忙zh忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
